channel.title: Windows on upyesp
channel.description: Recent content in Windows on upyesp

item.title: Install Manim On Windows 10 & Windows 11
item.description: Manim is a Python based tool that creates animations of math and technical concepts.

item.title: Working With Python Virtual Environments
item.description: Here’s how to use virtual environments within Python projects to reduce the risk of version conflicts across Python projects.

item.title: Use An Alias To Quickly Find Your IP Address - Windows & Linux
item.description: Here’s how to create Alias commands to simplify tasks on the command line. The examples given relate to retrieving IP addresses. The process is shown for Linux using Bash and Windows using PowerShell.

item.title: Browsing A WSL Distro In Explorer
item.description: If you have installed WSL and one or more linux distributions, it is possible to work with the contents of their file systems from within Windows Explorer.

item.title: How To Avoid Long OneDrive Folder Names
item.description: If your employer or university provides you with Microsoft OneDrive, you’ll know how useful it can be right? The OneDrive folder name tends to be very long though, like “OneDrive - The University of Quahog”. The long name can get in the way, like in the prompt of an IDE, in a terminal session or when browsing files in Explorer. One simple command, mklink, can fix that.

item.title: MySQL and Windows Terminal
item.description: MySQL has it’s own terminal emulator, providing a command-line interface (CLI) for the direct input and execution of SQL commands and scripts.

item.title: Markdown, Mathematical Expressions and VSCode
item.description: Markdown documents can include elegant representations of algebraic formulae, using KaTeX.

item.title: Adding Colour & Icons to File Listings in a Terminal
item.description: Adding icons and colour to folders and files improves the user experience in PowerShell.

item.title: Edge Browser as a PDF Viewer & Markup
item.description: Microsoft’s Edge browser supports viewing PDF files. It enables marking up PDFs with your own comments, highlights and drawings. Several keyboard shortcuts make for efficient navigation through a PDF.

item.title: Launching Windows Apps From Within WSL
item.description: The interoperability provided by WSL enables calling or running Windows applications directly from within the Linux command line.
